coupon.source_phrase_block: This discount pass is good for 4 general admissions at half price. Reservations do not need to be made in advance. This pass is for general admission only and special programs the museum offers are not included in the pass ( this included Kids' Countdown to New Year's Eve (on New Year's Eve Day), Fairy Festival (TBD), or other programs that have special pricing)* The Wenham Museum is not open Easter, Independence Day, Thanksgiving Day, Christmas Eve, Christmas Day or New Year's Day. We are not open on Mondays - except for MLK Day, Presidents' Day and Veterans' Day. During mid May - Labor Day, we are not open on Sundays in the Summer. For admission for this pass, simply show the confirmation email on your phone at the front desk of the museum or bring a printed out copy. This is an electronic pass that will be sent to your email.
